reviews.comment:
Ypf del aca. Esta un poco venida a menos, le falta modernización. No tiene algunas promos de descuentos que so tienen las de ruta. Es un poco más barata para socios del aca.

(Translated by Google)
The YPF station here is a bit run-down and needs modernization. It doesn't offer some of the discounts that the other stations along the route do. It's a bit cheaper for ACA members.
